meta.title: CIP, Cults, and Audit Persistent Threats
meta.description:
From the S4x25 Stage: If you’re tired of CIP requirements being disconnected from reality, stop shouting from the sidelines.

Episode 3 of Unsolicited Response is a call to action:
✅ Join a drafting team
✅ Do more than the bare minimum
✅ And stop blaming APTs when your biggest threat might be the audit process itself.
